basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Patna Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Head and Coordinator Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Patna

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Life Sciences /MBBS/First class in BTech/ M.Sc degree in Life Sciences/ Electrical/ Electronics/ Mechanical/ Computer science/ Biomedical/IT or equivalent, Ph.D./First class in Postgraduate in Life Sciences /MBBS/BDS/Business Administration/Technology or equivalent
qualification.details: Head (Incubation Centre): Ph.D. in Life Sciences /MBBS/First class in BTech/ M.Sc degree in Life Sciences/ Electrical/ Electronics/ Mechanical/ Computer science/ Biomedical/IT or equivalent. Experience: Four years’ experience with PhD, or 6 years with MBBS/MTech, or 12 years’ experience with MSc/BTech degree, having demonstrated hands-on expertise in different technology platforms. The experience in a scientific organization of repute in the area of R&D, bio-incubator or research management only shall be counted. Desirable: At least 5-7 years of experience in business management, or management of the intellectual property, or project management. 1st class in MBA or Equivalent (MBBS/MS/graduation in engineering or equivalent); minimum 10 years of work experience. Coordinator: Ph.D./First class in Postgraduate in Life Sciences /MBBS/BDS/Business Administration/Technology or equivalent. Desirable: Three years’ experience with PhD, or 5 years with MBBS/MTech, 8 years’ experience with MSc/BTech degree, having demonstrated hands-on expertise in different technology platforms. The experience in a scientific organization of repute in the area of R&D, bio-incubator or research management only shall be counted. Priority will be given to prior experience in Incubation Centres for at least 2 – 3 years.

salary_details.details: Head (Incubation Centre): Rs. 1,20,000.00/- p.m. Coordinator: Rs. 90,000/- p.m.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Patna Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Patna Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Patna Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the AIIMS Patna recruitment is 22nd June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Head (Incubation Centre) and Coordinator posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced by AIIMS Patna for the positions of Head (Incubation Centre) and Coordinator.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline. Candidates need to send their applications to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 90,000 to Rs. 1,20,000 per month, depending on the specific post and qualifications.

faq.question: Q5. What are the minimum qualifications required?
faq.answer: The minimum qualifications include a Ph.D. in Life Sciences, MBBS, or a First-class B.Tech/M.Sc degree in relevant fields, with specific experience requirements for each post.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for AIIMS Patna Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a screening of applications followed by an interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form details can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article, with direct links provided.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is Contractual, as per the official notification released by AIIMS Patna.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of AIIMS Patna?
faq.answer: AIIMS Patna is located in Patna, Bihar, with the pincode 801507.
